title: UDS Component Implementation Reference
description: Per-component impl.json file. Powers the 'Implementation Reference' details on the Code tab — the 'Component File' tab (raw HTML), the 'Behavior (JS)' tab (links to a JS init function), and the 'Tokens Used' tab (categorized list of CSS custom properties). Migrated from the legacy IMPL_DATA global table during the Phase 13 cleanup.

jsFunc.description: Name of the init function defined in <id>.js, e.g. 'initTextInput'. Null if the component is CSS-only.

jsFile.description: Path to the JS file containing jsFunc, relative to uds-docs/. Null when jsFunc is null. Replaces the legacy JS_FUNC_TO_FILE global table that mapped function names to file paths.

tokens.description: CSS custom properties the component depends on, grouped by category. Common groups: Color, Font, Space, Border. Each group is an array of token names like '--uds-color-surface-main'.

html.description: The full HTML body shown in the 'Component File' tab and bundled into the ZIP download. Includes <!DOCTYPE>, <head>, <link> tags, and component example markup. Plain string — no template substitution.
